hero.title:
Maximum Yield for Growers,
Total Precision for Specialists.
hero.subtitle: Providing growers with absolute harvest control and phytosanitary experts with advanced diagnostic tools. An all-in-one solution that transforms satellite and climate data into critical decisions.

aboutIntro.eyebrow: Built for the modern olive ecosystem
aboutIntro.title: Turn environmental and field data into actionable intelligence. Monitor plot health, anticipate pest risk, and act earlier to protect yield and production stability.

problemCards.title: Traditional olive farming leaves too much to chance
problemCards.description: Scattered field records, reactive pest response, and climate uncertainty make olive production harder to predict. Today's olive sector needs earlier signals, clearer risk visibility, and better decisions.

yields.title: Unpredictable Yields
yields.description: Olive trees naturally alternate between high and low production years. Without precise stress management and data tracking, financial forecasting and harvest planning become incredibly difficult.

pests.title: Epidemiological Pest Threats
pests.description: Pests like the Olive Fruit Fly can devastate crops rapidly. Relying on reactive treatments instead of early alerts leads to irreversible crop loss, lower oil quality, and excessive chemical costs.

climate.title: Climate Volatility and ENSO Impact
climate.description: The El Niño-Southern Oscillation drastically alters temperature and humidity. These sudden micro-climate shifts directly disrupt flowering, fruit set, and overall orchard health.

problemPanel.introText: Olive farming is becoming more volatile. Don't just react to field risk — anticipate it. Viora helps you move forward with actionable data, earlier pest-risk visibility, and direct access to the right crop protection specialist.
problemPanel.expandedText: Viora transforms environmental uncertainty into early, actionable risk intelligence for every olive plot.

solutionPanel.title: Turn olive field data into preventive decisions
solutionPanel.subtitle: Predict earlier. Respond smarter.

alerts.title: Epidemiological Alerts
alerts.description: Detect early warning signs of phytosanitary risk and receive timely alerts before outbreaks escalate across your plot or nearby fields.

marketplace.title: Specialist Marketplace
marketplace.description: Connect with crop protection specialists in your area, compare profiles, and reach the right expert when your field needs fast technical support.

ndvi.title: NDVI Monitoring
ndvi.description: Monitor canopy vigor remotely to detect early stress patterns and support faster field decisions with satellite-based visibility.

chill.title: Chill Portion Tracking
chill.description: Track chill accumulation across the season to anticipate phenological risk, protect flowering conditions, and reduce alternate bearing uncertainty.

nutrition.title: Dynamic Nutrition Plans
nutrition.description: Receive data-driven nutrition recommendations that adapt to field conditions, helping you respond earlier to stress and protect crop performance.

climate.title: Climate Risk Outlook
climate.description: Follow changing climate conditions and thermal anomalies to anticipate stress events, prepare earlier, and make more confident seasonal decisions.

expectedOutcomes.title: MAKE SMARTER OLIVE DECISIONS AND REDUCE SEASONAL RISK.

growers.label: Target Olive Growers in Early Adoption

recommendation.title: NEVER FACE A PEST OUTBREAK ALONE
recommendation.description: When risk rises, Viora connects you with nearby specialists who can review your field data, assess the situation, and help you respond faster with targeted technical action.

roleBenefits.title: One platform. Two powerful experiences.
roleBenefits.description: Whether you manage olive production or provide crop protection services, Viora gives you the tools and connections to act earlier and decide better.

producer.title: For Olive Producers
producer.pill1: Satellite, climate, and chill portion monitoring.
producer.pill3: Alternate bearing prediction and dynamic nutrition support.
producer.note: Climate volatility and sudden pest outbreaks make olive production harder to predict. Viora turns field data into actionable insights, helping you detect risk earlier, protect yield, and respond faster with the right specialist when needed.

specialist.title: Phytosanitary specialists
specialist.pill1: Access new service opportunities through the specialist marketplace.
specialist.pill2: Review plot context, NDVI patterns, and reported field risk signals.
specialist.pill3: Digital prescriptions and field assessment tools.
specialist.note: Finding new clients and responding early to field risk is difficult without the right signals. Viora helps you discover service opportunities, review field context with satellite-based indicators, and deliver faster, more structured technical guidance.

pricingIntro.firstSubtitle: Waiting for pests, stress signals, or climate damage to appear often costs more than preventing them with real-time field intelligence.
pricingIntro.secondTitle: And invest in a proactive plan
pricingIntro.secondSubtitle: Select a Viora subscription that fits your orchard's needs. Stop waiting for pest damage to happen and start preventing it with real-time data.

referralsInfo.title: Invite others to Viora. Grow the ecosystem together.
referralsInfo.description: Share your unique referral link with olive growers and crop protection specialists. When invited users join Viora and complete their first key action, you unlock predefined rewards inside the ecosystem.

track.title: Track New Sign-Ups

rewards.title: Unlock Rewards
rewards.description: Earn predefined benefits when your referrals complete their first key action.

grow.title: Grow Together
grow.description: Help expand a smarter olive ecosystem while increasing the value of your own account.

aboutMission.title: Our Mission
aboutMission.subtitle: Rooted in agriculture, driven by precision.
aboutMission.statement: Helping olive growers and crop protection specialists make earlier, smarter decisions.
aboutMission.description: We are ArcadiaDevs, a software and design team building Viora: a SaaS platform focused on the intelligent management of olive production. We combine environmental data, early phytosanitary alerts, and specialist connection to help the olive sector respond with greater clarity and confidence.

contact.title: Talk to the team behind Viora
